reviews.comment:
No vayan a la noche que no tienen ganas de atenderte, me tuvieron 10 minutos solo sin atender! Cuando llegue me dijeron “ya te atendemos” y después de mil vueltas me dicen que están en el
Cambio de Turno el cual raramente incitaron 21;45

(Translated by Google)
Don't go at night; they're not in the mood to help you. They kept me waiting for 10 minutes without attending to me! When I arrived, they told me, "We'll be with you," and after a lot of back and forth, they told me they were in the middle of a shift change, which they hadn't even bothered to initiate. 9:45 PM
